name: PaperQA2 open-source reference profile
description: Reference profile for Future-House PaperQA2 as an open-source agentic RAG system for reading local scientific documents and returning evidence-grounded answers.
declared_capabilities: read local PDFs and text-like files
build a local full-text and embedding-backed index
configure source limits, readers, prompts, and model providers
citation_support: document_or_page_citations; Contract2Agent line citations require adapter mapping
policy_constraints: Run only against an approved corpus directory.
Keep PaperQA2 indexes and caches inside the run directory when evaluating.
Disable or explicitly approve metadata, LLM, and embedding network calls.
Use manifest metadata when possible to reduce LLM metadata inference.
Do not treat upstream publications or demos as observed Contract2Agent results.

content_inventory: docs tutorials and LitQA2 split metadata
packages for docling, nemotron, pymupdf, and pypdf readers
src/paperqa agents, clients, configs, sources, docs, readers, settings, prompts, and types
tests with cassettes, stub data, agent tests, CLI tests, client tests, config tests, and PaperQA tests
README, LICENSE, CITATION.cff, CONTRIBUTING.md, pyproject.toml, and uv.lock
evaluation_use: task family inspiration for PDF, Office, code, HTML, multimodal, evidence ranking, and source-limit tests
